title: Sharpend Corners (GUI Scale 3x)
description: [(UN)OFFICIAL] Support for GUI Scale 3x on the Sharpend Corners pack by sp1oo
body:
## [THIS IS AN (UN)OFFICIAL PORT FOR GUI SCALE 3x]
## Original by [sp1oo](https://modrinth.com/user/sp1oo) is [HERE](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharpend-corners)
This pack is an **extension of the original pack**, but made **SPECIFICALLY** for **GUI Scale 3x** and no other scale, as it uses the uncommon **48x texture resolution**, which happens to work perfectly on 3x, making the **edges look ridicolously sharp**.
## Again, original is made by sp1oo, show him some love :D

### FONT NOT INCLUDED, CHECK MY PROFILE FOR 48x FONT PACKS

![FONT NOT INCLUDED - CHECK MY PROFILE FOR 48x FONT PACKS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93c82e4a1c0a4ad262d4c356a2180fb6cfdf742e.png)

### ORIGINAL PICTURE

![ORIGINAL PICTURE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78c8d358a87cb16d70d5d858f59e9914b005d4f1.png)

## Licensing ([Under 'Copyright and Reuploads'](https://modrinth.com/legal/rules))
The original texture pack (and this one for licensing reasons, look up if interested) uses the "**Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial Share Alike 4.0 International**" license
- Personal permession from creator ✅ (Had to get in contact with them over steam XD)
